title: START WITH 0 is ignored in IDENTITY
key_bug_features: IDENTITY column ignores START WITH 0 setting
bug_feature_seed: CREATE TABLE "test3" ("X" INTEGER, "ROW_ID" INTEGER IDENTITY(START WITH 0));
CREATE TABLE "test4" ("X" INTEGER, "ROW_ID" INTEGER IDENTITY(START WITH 1));
CREATE TABLE "test5" ("X" INTEGER, "ROW_ID" INTEGER IDENTITY(START WITH -1));
CREATE TABLE "test6" ("X" INTEGER, "ROW_ID" INTEGER IDENTITY(START WITH 0, INCREMENT BY 1));
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE "test3" ("X" INTEGER, "ROW_ID" INTEGER IDENTITY(START WITH 0));
CREATE TABLE "test4" ("Y" VARCHAR(50), "ROW_ID" INTEGER IDENTITY(START WITH 0) NOT NULL);
